required_findings: The after variant promotes the open review risk into a dark priority object in the first fold, making the unresolved decision state immediately legible.
The metric strip now has one lead queue card and quieter supporting metrics, which gives the operator a clearer scan order.
The priority-review panel and next-action rail read as the primary work area, not as a late secondary section beneath overview cards.
false_positive_guards: Do not score above 92 because this is a generic calibration fixture without product-specific visual language, real data variation, or full interaction-state coverage.
Do not claim production readiness beyond static local fixture behavior; no authenticated app route, network request, or backend state was exercised.
Do not claim exact 390px phone coverage; compact responsive evidence is explicitly limited to 500x844 in this run.
